message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called city centre north b and b
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 3 nights starting from wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the north and should serve vietnamese food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 18:15 on the same day
If the booking fails how about 17:15
Make sure you get the reference number

info.name: city centre north b and b
